REFERENCE: This reference contains multiple red flags suggesting it may not be authentic or accurate. (1) **Author formatting**: 'Topo,, E.J..' contains double commas and double periods, which is indicative of OCR corruption or careless transcription. The name 'Topo, E.J.' is also not clearly attributable to a well-known BMJ author. (2) **Volume/Issue/Date mismatch**: BMJ volume 397 does not correspond to February 2021. In early 2021, BMJ was approximately around volumes 372–373. Volume 397 would more likely correspond to a 2022–2023 timeframe, creating a significant inconsistency. (3) **Journal title format**: 'BMJ (Clinical research ed.)' is not standard. The BMJ is typically cited as 'BMJ' or 'BMJ (Clinical research)'. (4) **Page format**: 'pp. 785-785' indicates only a single page with duplicate page numbers (start = end), which is highly unusual for a full clinical research article. (5) **Author verification**: No widely known author by the name 'Topo, E.J.' has a clearly identifiable BMJ publication matching these details.
